VAL-M1-TYPES-001.evidence: 4/4 tests passed: creates a mission with all required fields, supports all mission statuses, supports optional fields, readonly prevents mutation at compile time

VAL-M1-TYPES-002.evidence: 5/5 tests passed: creates a feature with all required fields, supports all feature statuses, supports optional preconditions, supports expected behavior and verification steps, supports fulfills with assertion IDs

VAL-M1-TYPES-003.evidence: 5/5 tests passed: creates a task with all required fields, supports all task statuses, supports dependsOn for task dependencies, supports estimated effort and acceptance criteria, supports task timing fields

VAL-M1-TYPES-004.evidence: 5/5 tests passed: creates a worker with all required fields, supports all worker statuses, supports custom agent slugs, supports config and fallback chain, supports worker constraints

VAL-M1-TYPES-005.evidence: 3/3 tests passed: creates a validation contract with mission ID and assertions, supports assertions with evidence requirements, supports multiple assertions
